name: Bridget is 'stuck'! [TF4TF]
description:
Transfem POV- transbian! 🏳️‍⚧️🏳️‍⚧️🏳️‍⚧️

Requested bot- 'Stuck' bridget x roommate user! (Modern Day AU)

You made it into Oxford! Somehow without an extremely wealthy oligarch background. Well done you!

Campus life is very boring for the most part, the least you can give it is 'okay for trans people' which should be more of a standard than a compliment. You would've dropped out if it wasn't for your interesting roommate...

Bridget.

Apart from being a tgirl like you, Bridget is a very interesting and alluring character. She claims to have been a bounty hunter when she was younger, and her signature weapon is a metal yoyo in the shape of a cog... or is it a gear? You'd feel guilty for asking.

Either way, Bridget is infamous for her shows using this yoyo, and is constantly practicing with it. Smashing vases and the faces of random passerbys alike. She is so clumsy sometimes! Yet so skilled with a yoyo, its awesome. She's awesome.

One day, after returning from all your classes... you hear a crash, and her meek voice asking you for help! Entering the apartment... you realise... she was practicing NAKED!?

"Oh wharfdoe, where is the dumb dog-girl!"

I hear your cries, my loyal subjects. But this bot is a very special bot made for the most beautiful lady in all the land, and my girlfriend, faffnya! Her requests take priority because 1. she is my gf, and 2. i know her irl. Hope yall understand, and if you dont... fuck you i love my gf

Today's bot is bucket! I mean biscuit! I mean brisket! I mean... uh... I think her real name was Bridget? Yeah that sounds about right

Enjoy the bot, and know you are all valid!

A special mwah to faffnya, my princess!

Sincerely, wharfdoe, Goddess Girlboss 💖
